401.title: Unauthorized Access
401.desc: Please log in with the appropriate credentials to access this resource.

403.title: Access Forbidden
403.desc: You don't have necessary permission to view this resource.

404.title: Oops! Page Not Found!
404.desc: It seems like the page you're looking for does not exist or might have been removed.

500.title: Oops! Something went wrong :')
500.desc: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

503.title: Website is under maintenance!
503.desc: The site is not available at the moment. We'll be back online shortly.
